name: micromobility.com Inc.
summary: PART I General The Company is a technology-focused enterprise providing software development and business services to the transportation, mobility, and technology sectors. Leveraging years of operational experience and data in innovative and sustainable transportation solutions, the Company delivers scalable, white-label technology solutions for customers in the transportation, mobility and broader technology sectors.
